\tzpentry{ID3680}{Kinetic Term Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3680 introduces Kinetic Term Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} K(r) = J_0\left( \frac{2\pi k \cdot e \cdot r}{N} \right) \end{equation}
